channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-06-24 10:15 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: USAID and other shady leftist charities used real suffering as a human shield for leftist graft! Alm...
item.description: USAID and other shady leftist charities used real suffering as a human shield for leftist graft! Almost 57% of USAID money to Haiti was...spent inside the DC Beltway. Just 2% made it to Haiti.

item.title: @elonmusk: 460 criminal charges $6.5B intended loss, $1.4B actual loss $127M seized assets Great work by@SecKen...
item.description: 460 criminal charges $6.5B intended loss, $1.4B actual loss $127M seized assets Great work by@SecKennedy,@DAGToddBlanche,@FBIDirectorKash, &@DrOzCMSon today’s fraud takedown. If you’re committing fraud, we’ll find you.

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon confirms "Starmind" will be the official name of@SpaceX's AI satellite constellation. Earlier t...
item.description: Elon confirms "Starmind" will be the official name of@SpaceX's AI satellite constellation. Earlier this year, SpaceX filed a request with the FCC to launch and operate a constellation of 1 million AI satellites. SpaceX's AI1 satellite:

item.title: @elonmusk: USAID funded the Wuhan lab Wuhan lab created SARS-CoV-2 Wuhan lab was making more viruses DOGE defun...
item.description: USAID funded the Wuhan lab Wuhan lab created SARS-CoV-2 Wuhan lab was making more viruses DOGE defunded USAID DOGE may have been the most important pandemic prevention agency of the past century

item.title: @elonmusk: If your sole value is identity, then someone else will use a more extreme identity to displace you.
item.description: If your sole value is identity, then someone else will use a more extreme identity to displace you.

item.title: @elonmusk: A message to the Republicans in congress and the Trump administration. Please stop treating legal im...
item.description: A message to the Republicans in congress and the Trump administration. Please stop treating legal immigration like just another issue to be fine tuned and start treating it like the existential threat that it is. Three genocidal communists were just elected to the House of Representatives because mass legal immigration from the third world made it possible to do so in New York City. If you don't ban immigration from the third world, your jobs will be gone too. You think this stays in New York? Your seat is next.

item.title: @elonmusk: "Democracy" is when the people vote for Brexit because they want less immigration, but they get expo...
item.description: "Democracy" is when the people vote for Brexit because they want less immigration, but they get exponentially more immigration as punishment.

item.title: @elonmusk: I warned you but you scoffed. You will regret your Suicidal Empathy.
item.description: I warned you but you scoffed. You will regret your Suicidal Empathy.

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk just confirmed that ‘Starmind’ will be the official name of the SpaceX AI satellite conste...
item.description: Elon Musk just confirmed that ‘Starmind’ will be the official name of the SpaceX AI satellite constellation

item.title: @elonmusk: People who are complaining that he spends the first half of the movie murdering white people not mig...
item.description: People who are complaining that he spends the first half of the movie murdering white people not migrants fail to understand that it’s hammering home an important premise. “Always hang a traitor before you shoot an enemy”

item.title: @elonmusk: Asmongold explains Keir Starmer's resignation using a WoW raid strategy and it makes perfect sense "...
item.description: Asmongold explains Keir Starmer's resignation using a WoW raid strategy and it makes perfect sense "Labour just performed a tank swap. Starmer had too many debuffs so they pulled him out and brought in a new tank." "The new guy is going to do the same thing for the same raid. They're tanking the same boss in the same way." "You're Onyxia. Don't fall for the tank swap. He's not the organization. You didn't win, they just reset your aggro."

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Build just got another update with many improvements Release Notes: v0.2.64 — 2026-06-24 Featur...
item.description: Grok Build just got another update with many improvements Release Notes: v0.2.64 — 2026-06-24 Features: • Dashboard now displays the current directory and branch; click or press Ctrl+L to change location, or Ctrl+W to dispatch new agents into fresh git worktrees. • /recap now appears as a collapsible tool-style block with a loading spinner while generating. Bug Fixes: • Dashboard arrow keys open agent details and exit overlays; closing an agent now selects the neighboring row. • /usage command and credit warnings are now hidden for API-key authentication. • MCP servers from your user config no longer appear labeled as project-scoped when running from your home directory.

item.title: @elonmusk: Report: Female cop shoots Jewish rabbi outside Pornhub office in Canada while hiding from Marxist gu...
item.description: Report: Female cop shoots Jewish rabbi outside Pornhub office in Canada while hiding from Marxist gunman who killed immigrant officer named Mohamednotthebee.com/t23da

item.title: @elonmusk: All DOGE required was contact information of the recipients to confirm that funding was not fraudule...
item.description: All DOGE required was contact information of the recipients to confirm that funding was not fraudulent. No validated medical funding was stopped. Anything that appeared to be legitimate lifesaving funding continued and is now administered by the State Department. If anyone had actually died as a result of DOGE, their names would be worldwide headline news! On the other hand, USAID did help fund the Wuhan Virology Institute, which caused the deaths of millions, and the revolution that started the Russia-Ukraine war.
